title: Lord of Winterfell
Warden of the North
House Stark.name: Eddard Stark
House Stark.description: Ned was a very honorable, honest, and dutiful man. He was also a strong believer in the old gods and the old ways, and preferred to administer justice himself, as he believed the judge should bear the burden of the punishment.
House Stark.weapon: Ice, the two-handed ancestral sword of House Stark

House Stark.name: Arya Stark
House Stark.description: Arya is a strong-willed and independent young girl who defies traditional gender roles. She has a fierce determination and a desire for vengeance against those who wronged her family.

title: Lord Commander of the Night's Watch
King in the North
Aegon Targaryen
House Stark.name: Jon Snow
House Stark.description: Jon Snow is known for his strong sense of honor and duty. He is a skilled warrior and leader, having risen through the ranks of the Night's Watch to become its Lord Commander. Later, he discovers his true parentage as the legitimate son of Rhaegar Targaryen and Lyanna Stark.

title: Queen of the Andals, the Rhoynar, and the First Men
Lady of Casterly Rock
House Lannister.name: Cersei Lannister
House Lannister.description: Cersei is a cunning and ambitious woman. She is known for her political intrigue and desire for power. She is fiercely protective of her children and is willing to do whatever it takes to keep them in positions of authority.
House Lannister.weapon: Cersei is not known for physical combat but uses her intelligence and influence as her weapons.

title: Hand of the King
Master of Coin
House Lannister.name: Tyrion Lannister
House Lannister.description: Tyrion is a highly intelligent and witty man, but his small stature has led to a life of mockery and prejudice. Despite this, he uses his intelligence to navigate the dangerous political landscape of Westeros.

title: Ser
Lord of Casterly Rock
House Lannister.name: Jaime Lannister
House Lannister.description: Jaime is a skilled knight and a member of the Kingsguard. He is best known for killing King Aerys II Targaryen, earning him the nickname 'Kingslayer.' Despite his reputation, Jaime has complex motives and a sense of honor.

title: King of the Andals, the Rhoynar, and the First Men
Lord of the Seven Kingdoms
House Baratheon.name: Robert Baratheon
House Baratheon.description: Robert Baratheon was a charismatic and robust warrior who led a rebellion against the Targaryen dynasty and became the king of the Seven Kingdoms. Over time, he grew disinterested in ruling and indulged in a life of feasting and hunting. His marriage to Cersei Lannister was politically motivated, leading to a tumultuous reign.

title: Lord of Dragonstone
Master of Ships
Hand of the King
Protector of the Realm
House Baratheon.name: Stannis Baratheon
House Baratheon.description: Stannis Baratheon is known for his rigid sense of justice and duty. He believes himself to be the rightful king of Westeros and is willing to do whatever it takes to claim the Iron Throne, even forming alliances with dark forces.

title: Lord of Storm's End
Master of Laws
King in Highgarden (self-proclaimed)
House Baratheon.name: Renly Baratheon
House Baratheon.description: Renly Baratheon was known for his charm and popularity. He declared himself king with the support of House Tyrell, leading to a rival claim for the Iron Throne. Despite his youthful demeanor, he was a contender for the throne before his untimely death.
